records.m_Talk_ENG: To defeat this many Shadows in such a short time...
records.m_Talk_DEU: To defeat this many Shadows in such a short time...
records.m_Talk_FRA: To defeat this many Shadows in such a short time...

records.m_Talk_ENG: If this had been the Normalside, we'd have become a numbered TASKFORCE overnight and made a fortune in bounties too.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If this had been the Normalside, we'd have become a numbered TASKFORCE overnight and made a fortune in bounties too.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If this had been the Normalside, we'd have become a numbered TASKFORCE overnight and made a fortune in bounties too.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's going on with them? We destroyed their cores, but they're still trying to move.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's going on with them? We destroyed their cores, but they're still trying to move.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's going on with them? We destroyed their cores, but they're still trying to move.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The core is only the source of power. The main is that shell.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The core is only the source of power. The main is that shell.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The core is only the source of power. The main is that shell.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As long as they're bound by those threads and the core's power is still circulating through the shell, they'll keep moving even after being reduced to pulp.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As long as they're bound by those threads and the core's power is still circulating through the shell, they'll keep moving even after being reduced to pulp.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As long as they're bound by those threads and the core's power is still circulating through the shell, they'll keep moving even after being reduced to pulp.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is troublesome. There are quite a lot of them, so it won't be easy to keep track of the ones we've already taken down.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is troublesome. There are quite a lot of them, so it won't be easy to keep track of the ones we've already taken down.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is troublesome. There are quite a lot of them, so it won't be easy to keep track of the ones we've already taken down.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The source of a Shadow's power... isn't that different from a Counter's CRF.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The source of a Shadow's power... isn't that different from a Counter's CRF.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The source of a Shadow's power... isn't that different from a Counter's CRF.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whoa.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whoa.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whoa.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Doctor? When did you get behind me?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Doctor? When did you get behind me?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Doctor? When did you get behind me?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Since I heard the sounds of fighting from the cabin.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Since I heard the sounds of fighting from the cabin.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Since I heard the sounds of fighting from the cabin.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Those Shadow husks all look like they'd be valuable for experiments.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Those Shadow husks all look like they'd be valuable for experiments.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Those Shadow husks all look like they'd be valuable for experiments.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Do you really have to be greedy about that even in a situation like this?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Do you really have to be greedy about that even in a situation like this?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Do you really have to be greedy about that even in a situation like this?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, the important part is that I came up with an idea to deal with those Shadows that are left with only their shells.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, the important part is that I came up with an idea to deal with those Shadows that are left with only their shells.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, the important part is that I came up with an idea to deal with those Shadows that are left with only their shells.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We just absorb all the power remaining in those shells and gather it into one place.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We just absorb all the power remaining in those shells and gather it into one place.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We just absorb all the power remaining in those shells and gather it into one place.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That sounds easy enough to say... but is there anyone among us who can do that?
records.m_Talk_DEU: That sounds easy enough to say... but is there anyone among us who can do that?
records.m_Talk_FRA: That sounds easy enough to say... but is there anyone among us who can do that?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's possible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's possible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's possible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If the Administrator would permit it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If the Administrator would permit it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If the Administrator would permit it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll trust your idea, Dr. Lone Lee.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll trust your idea, Dr. Lone Lee.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll trust your idea, Dr. Lone Lee.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hehe... of course.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hehe... of course.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hehe... of course.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you just throw something?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you just throw something?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you just throw something?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Huh? What is that...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Huh? What is that...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Huh? What is that...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Is that like a catchem-ball?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Is that like a catchem-ball?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Is that like a catchem-ball?

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's not exactly the same, but I can't deny the comparison.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's not exactly the same, but I can't deny the comparison.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's not exactly the same, but I can't deny the comparison.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Go. Nibble.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Go. Nibble.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Go. Nibble.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Devour them all!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Devour them all!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Devour them all!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ooh...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ooh...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ooh...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Keke...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Keke...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Keke...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kehehe, it's overflowing. I've never felt this powerful before.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kehehe, it's overflowing. I've never felt this powerful before.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kehehe, it's overflowing. I've never felt this powerful before.

records.m_Talk_ENG: More are coming!
records.m_Talk_DEU: More are coming!
records.m_Talk_FRA: More are coming!
